message:
feat: membrane policy instrumentation + code reorg

signal_abi: Add membrane policy checks to sigfillset, sigaddset,
sigismember, and sigaction with proper observe calls.

resolv_abi: Add membrane policy checks to gethostbyaddr_r_impl,
getservbyname, getprotobyname. Replace CStr::from_ptr with safer
scan_c_string pattern.

wchar_abi: Move basename/dirname/realpath to stdlib_abi.rs where
they belong (libgen.h is part of POSIX base, not wchar).

libc.map: Minor updates to version script exports.

All 169 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
